prompt: Create a colorful single-panel anime travel meme postcard set in Kyoto. Canvas: landscape 4:3 composition with a thin black rounded border, like the first panel of a four-panel comic. In the top-left corner, place a small white rounded square label containing the black number “1”. Background: a bright spring Kyoto street scene with traditional wooden machiya houses, stone-paved road receding into the distance, a large multi-tiered pagoda near the center-right, Kyoto Tower visible far in the distance, blue sky, mountains, and pink cherry blossoms overhead with petals drifting through the air. Foreground: on the right half, draw an elegant anime-style young woman wearing a pale yellow floral kimono with a dark navy obi, posed like a welcoming guide with one hand extended toward the city. She has vivid blue shoulder-length wavy hair and a decorative flower hair ornament with dangling gold tassels. Her face is intentionally covered by a large opaque square censor block with a vertical blue-gray to beige gradient, centered over the face and obscuring all facial features. Text: on the upper-left and center-left, add large hand-brushed Japanese calligraphy reading 京都へ おこしやす, with “京都へ” in dark red and “おこしやす” in dark navy, plus a red swoosh underline and two small flower icons. Style: polished GPT-image anime illustration, clean line art, saturated spring colors, soft sunlight, high detail in architecture and kimono pattern, cheerful tourism-poster mood. Constraints: include exactly one numbered panel label, exactly one foreground character, exactly one face-covering square, and do not add extra captions, watermarks, speech bubbles, or additional characters.
